title: Precision loss on a DECIMAL column in complex queries involving INTERSECT and functions in the ON clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(20,10));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT id, value FROM t1 WHERE value > 100.0;
SELECT DISTINCT v1.value, t1.value FROM t1 INNER JOIN v1 ON v1.value = ROUND(t1.value, 2);
SELECT DISTINCT v1.value, t1.value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN v1 ON v1.value = CAST(t1.value AS DECIMAL(20,10));
key_bug_features: Precision loss in DECIMAL column with complex queries
